Answer: Like ratio → Ratios with same terms
Unit ratio → One of the terms is 1
Equivalent ratio → Different ratio with same value

Set B: Multiplying both terms by same number
Answer: Scaling up → Multiplying both terms by same number

Set B: Dividing both terms by same number
Answer: Scaling down → Dividing both terms by same number
Continuous proportion → Middle term in a:b = b:c
